how_it_works: Influenced bases (Shaper, Elder, or one of four Conqueror influences) can roll exclusive mods not available on normal items. Use Orbs of Alteration, Essences, or Fossils to roll influenced items. Two different Conqueror-influenced items can be merged with an Awakener's Orb, transferring both influences to the target base.
tips: Awakener's Orb combines two Conqueror-influenced items — both influences transfer to the target base
Shaper and Elder are mutually exclusive. Conqueror influences (Warlord/Crusader/Redeemer/Hunter) can pair with each other via Awakener's Orb
Influenced mods are prefixes or suffixes like normal mods — check whether the slot you need is prefix or suffix before rolling

mods.mod_name: Nearby Enemies have -X% to Elemental Resistances
mods.notes: Stacks additively with curses (Flammability, etc.) and exposure. Best-in-slot support mod for any elemental damage build.

mods.mod_name: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level X Concentrated Effect / Slower Projectiles
best_for: Shaped helmets with specific skill links
mods.notes: Free support gem link — significant DPS increase if the skill benefits from the specific support.

mods.mod_name: X% reduced Flask Charges used
mods.notes: Reduces how quickly flasks drain. Enables more defensive or offensive flask cycling.

mods.mod_name: Gain X Mana on Kill
mods.notes: Provides passive mana sustain without Clarity. Effective in map clear, less so for bossing.

mods.mod_name: Gain X% of Maximum Mana as Extra Maximum Energy Shield
mods.notes: Synergises with Mind Over Matter and large mana pools.

mods.mod_name: Adds X-Y Lightning Damage to Attacks
mods.notes: Flat damage addition applies before any multipliers. Useful on high-APS builds.

mods.mod_name: Gain Onslaught for 4 seconds on Kill
mods.notes: Free Onslaught (20% more attack/cast/move speed) during map clear. Less useful for bossing.

mods.mod_name: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level X Greater Multiple Projectiles
mods.notes: Free GMP link. Near-mandatory for many projectile builds. Costs a support gem slot.

mods.mod_name: Curse Enemies with Vulnerability/Temporal Chains/Despair on Hit
mods.notes: Auto-curses on hit without needing Hextouch or a curse skill. Very slot-efficient.

mods.mod_name: X% of Physical Damage taken from Hits as Chaos Damage
mods.notes: With CI, chaos damage taken is zero — effectively converts a portion of physical hits to no damage.

mods.mod_name: Gain Fortify on Melee Hit
mods.notes: Provides Fortify (20% reduced damage taken) passively without dedicating a support gem slot.

mods.mod_name: You can apply an additional Curse
mods.notes: Allows 2 curses simultaneously without the Whispers of Doom keystone. Very powerful for curse-stacking.

mods.mod_name: Corrupted Blood cannot be inflicted on you
mods.notes: Immunity to Corrupted Blood (from Corrupted Essence and some map bosses). Can also be a corrupted implicit.

mods.mod_name: X% of Damage Leeched as Life and Mana
mods.notes: Combined life and mana leech on one suffix. Efficient for builds that need both.

mods.mod_name: X% increased Damage during any Flask Effect
mods.notes: Global damage increase during flasks. Pairs well with perma-flask uptime builds.

mods.mod_name: X% of Elemental Damage taken as Physical Damage
mods.notes: Converts elemental hits to physical, where armour and Endurance Charges provide mitigation.

mods.mod_name: Adds X-Y Physical Damage to Attacks
mods.notes: Flat physical damage. Scales well with high attack speed.

mods.mod_name: X% increased Endurance, Frenzy and Power Charge Duration
mods.notes: Extends all charge types simultaneously. Useful for builds with multiple charge types.

mods.mod_name: X% increased Life Regeneration Rate
mods.notes: Multiplies existing regen. More valuable the higher your base regen is.

mods.mod_name: Enemies you Kill have X% chance to Explode, dealing 3% of their Life as Physical Damage
mods.notes: Free explosions scale with enemy HP. Synergises with Shaper of Flames for fire conversion.

mods.mod_name: Adds X-Y Fire Damage to Attacks
mods.notes: Flat fire damage. Can trigger Combust or support Ignite builds.

mods.mod_name: X% of Physical Damage converted to Fire Damage
mods.notes: High conversion %. Stacks with other phys-to-fire conversion sources.

mods.mod_name: Debuffs on you expire X% faster
mods.notes: Reduces duration of Bleeding, Ignite, Poison, and other debuffs on you.

mods.mod_name: Attacks have X% chance to inflict Cold Exposure on Hit
mods.notes: Cold Exposure applies -10% to enemy cold res. Automatic on hit — no skill needed.

mods.mod_name: X% of Physical Damage converted to Cold Damage
mods.notes: Enables phys-to-cold conversion for attack builds without needing specific weapons.

mods.mod_name: Gain X% of Maximum Mana as Extra Maximum Energy Shield
mods.notes: Converts mana pool to ES — useful for builds with large mana investment.

mods.mod_name: X% chance to generate a Power Charge on Critical Strike
mods.notes: Passive power charge generation on crit. Frees up other charge-generation slots.

mods.mod_name: Attacks have X% chance to inflict Chaos Exposure on Hit
mods.notes: Chaos Exposure applies -10% enemy chaos res. Scales chaos DoT and hit builds.

mods.mod_name: X% of Physical Damage converted to Chaos Damage
mods.notes: Enables phys skills to deal chaos damage. Combined with Bane or Toxic Rain for high chaos scaling.

mods.mod_name: Adds X-Y Chaos Damage to Attacks
mods.notes: One of the few sources of flat chaos damage to attacks. Very powerful for poison builds.

mods.mod_name: X% increased Chaos Damage
mods.notes: Global chaos damage multiplier. Best-in-slot amulet mod for pure chaos builds.
